name: Stuffed Baked Potatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Rub potatoes with oil if desired.
2. Pierce each potato with a fork.
3. Bake at 400°F for 1 hour and 20 minutes or until tender. Allow to cool slightly.
4. Cut potatoes in half lengthwise and carefully scoop out the pulp, leaving a thin shell.
5. Place the scooped-out pulp in a large bowl.
6. Saute onions in 1/4 cup butter until tender.
7. Add sauted onions to the potato pulp along with light cream, sour cream, salt, and pepper. Beat until smooth.
8. Fold in the shredded cheddar cheese.
9. Stuff the potato shells with the mixture and place them in a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
10. Melt the remaining butter; drizzle over the potatoes.
11. Sprinkle with paprika.
12. Bake at 350°F for 20-30 minutes or until heated through.
YIELD: 6 servings
